mapper.sql: id, pco_id, order_id, order_item, ass_num, num, pco_source, pco_type, prod_type, warehouse_code, customer_no, model_no, weight, qty, pco_status, wl_date, hope_date, user_no, green_code, is_wms, bomId, spceial_flag, out_qty, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, ro_id, special_bom_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_pco
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_pco (id, pco_id, order_id, order_item, ass_num, num, pco_source, pco_type, prod_type, warehouse_code, customer_no, model_no, weight, qty, pco_status, wl_date, hope_date, user_no, green_code, is_wms, bomId, spceial_flag, out_qty, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, ro_id, special_bom_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bomid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialBomId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into dbo.ops_pco
id,
pco_id,
order_id,
order_item,
ass_num,
num,
pco_source,
pco_type,
prod_type,
warehouse_code,
customer_no,
model_no,
weight,
qty,
pco_status,
wl_date,
hope_date,
user_no,
green_code,
is_wms,
bomId,
spceial_flag,
out_qty,
remark,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
ro_id,
special_bom_id,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_pco
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ass_num = #{record.assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_source = #{record.pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_type = #{record.pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prod_type = #{record.prodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_status = #{record.pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_date = #{record.hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_wms = #{record.isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bomId = #{record.bomid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
spceial_flag = #{record.spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
special_bom_id = #{record.specialBomId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.ops_pco set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ass_num = #{record.assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_source = #{record.pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_type = #{record.pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prod_type = #{record.prodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_status = #{record.pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, hope_date = #{record.hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, green_code = #{record.greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_wms = #{record.isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bomId = #{record.bomid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, spceial_flag = #{record.spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, special_bom_id = #{record.specialBomId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_pco
pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ass_num = #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_source = #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_type = #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prod_type = #{prodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_status = #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_date = #{hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_wms = #{isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bomId = #{bomid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
spceial_flag = #{spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
out_qty = #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
special_bom_id = #{specialBomId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_pco set pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ass_num = #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_source = #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_type = #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prod_type = #{prodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_status = #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wl_date = #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, hope_date = #{hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, green_code = #{greenCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_wms = #{isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bomId = #{bomid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, spceial_flag = #{spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, out_qty = #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, special_bom_id = #{specialBomId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
